title: COX_TDP-fingerprinting-datasets
author: Cox, Dezerae
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains exemplar and pre-processed datasets used in the research manuscript titled  Fingerprinting disease-derived protein aggregates reveals unique signature of Motor Neuron Disease . 
  Datasets  
 The datasets are provided in the following categories: 
  microscopy-tissue  and  microscopy-RRMs : Contain summary data derived from  smma  processing of raw TIRF microscopy images. To enable exploration of the pipeline, exemplar images are also provided in  microscopy-examples . 
 -  proteomics : Contains pre-processed datasets generated by MaxQuant, alongside the summary data used for visualisations. 
 -  orthogonals : Contains pre-processed datasets for the qPCR and ASC speck analyses. 
 Please refer to the manuscript for detailed information about the data generation and preprocessing steps. These datasets enable reproduction of the results presented in the manuscript via the corresponding code repository available  here .
